description: Your Juris-M library contains 12 court cases from the United States, United Kingdom, and Canada that need to be organized for a comparative constitutional law course. Organize these cases into a parent collection named 'Comparative Constitutional Law' with subcollections named 'US Cases', 'UK Cases', and 'Canada Cases'. Assign each case to its corresponding jurisdiction subcollection and tag them with 'United States', 'United Kingdom', or 'Canada' respectively. Identify and correct any missing or 'Unknown Court' fields for the US and UK cases, ensuring US Supreme Court cases are labeled 'United States Supreme Court' and UK House of Lords cases are labeled 'House of Lords'. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

us_cases: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
uk_cases: R v Secretary of State for the Home Department ex p Simms
